chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P No.D-214 of 2019 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A 1162/19 2. For orders on office objection 3. For hearing of MA 1163/19 4. For hearing of main case. 06.03.2019 No one is present on behalf of the petitioner. No intimation is received. We have seen the petition wherein the petitioner is seeking compensation and possession of his land, which relief cannot be extended to him under the writ jurisdiction of this court under Article 199 of the Constitution of Islamic Republic of Pakistan, 1973. This being the position, we feel that this petition is palpably not maintainable and is accordingly dismissed in limine alongwith listed applications. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
